intro: Meta is developing an AI pendant as part of a broader hardware strategy. SoftBank plans to invest up to €75 billion in French AI data centers across Dunkirk, Bouchain, and Bosquel. Meanwhile, Utah's governor tightened regulations on a 40,000-acre hyperscale data center campus approved despite local opposition.

whitelist.title: Meta is reportedly developing an AI pendant | TechCrunch
whitelist.desc: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware.

whitelist.title: SoftBank plans up to €75 billion investment in French AI centers | Fortune
whitelist.desc: SoftBank’s initial investment plans to deliver data centers in Dunkirk, Bosquel and Bouchain.

whitelist.title: Utah's governor just tightened the rules for Kevin O'Leary's giant AI data center
whitelist.desc: Tensions have been high in Utah after a local commission, despite opposition, approved a hyperscale data center campus spanning 40,000 acres.
